creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

The patch in ports/135860 is not for kdeedu3.  I do not think it would 
even solve the problem were it to be applied similarly since there is 
no USB_SET_TIMEOUT any longer. 

kdeedu3 is still broken on -current.  Until a fix is committed, this 
patch should stay open.  Similarly, ports/135860 is still open even 
though a patch has been submitted but not committed.
